string.text: Toggle your HUD with a single hotkey. Each element below can be set to Always show, Always hide, or Toggle with Hotkey (hidden until you press the key). Bind your hotkey first as it is unbound by default.
The key that shows or hides the HUD. Pressing it flips every element set to "Toggle with Hotkey" between shown and hidden. Elements set to "Toggle with Hotkey" start hidden each time a save loads.
An optional modifier (Shift, Ctrl, or Alt) that must be held together with the toggle hotkey for it to fire.
When enabled, toggling the HUD with the hotkey automatically hides it again after the "Reveal duration" set below (in seconds).
Show health and statuses while in inventory
While your inventory or PDA is open, show BHS health HUD and status effects.
When you take a hit, briefly show the BHS panel even if it is set to "Always hide" or currently hidden.

While the BHS panel is hidden, reveal just the stamina bar (and its icon) once you have spent about 10% of your stamina, and keep it shown until it refills. The full body-health panel (BHS) still shows its stamina bar as normal when it is revealed.
The status-effect icons such as hunger, thirst, radiation, bleeding, etc.
The bottom-left news pop-ups (pickups, tips, task updates, faction messages).
The small notification icon on the right that blips when a new PDA message arrives.
The on-screen companion list (health, distance, orders) shown when you have squad members. Requires the GAMMA companion HUD.
